name: Hunyuan (1st-gen)
note: Tencent's first in-house foundation model (100B+ params, 2T+ pretraining tokens), launched for enterprises via Tencent Cloud API and wired into 50+ Tencent products.
verificationNotes: Confirmed existence and release (Sept 7, 2023, Global Digital Ecosystem Summit) plus '100B+ params, 2T+ tokens' claim via Tencent's own announcement article and corroborating press (Yahoo Finance/SCMP/Pandaily). FLAGGED, NOT CORRECTED: ctxK=4 (4K context) could not be independently confirmed — the cited source article does not mention context length at all, and no other primary source could be found tying a specific context-window figure to this original Sept-2023 release (later 2024-era Hunyuan API tiers like hunyuan-lite show 3K-28K depending on interface, unrelated to this model). Schema requires a numeric ctxK so the original value was kept, but treat it as low-confidence/unverified rather than confirmed. paramsB kept null since only '100B+' was ever disclosed, no exact figure found. No results/benchmark rows were present to verify.
